calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-07-2007 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar May-07-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge Dept. for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: P. Dias, CSR: Patricia Abalos.
Cindy Lee, Esq. for Plaintiff: San Francisco Housing Authority.
Plaintiff's Witness: Cheryl Lewis, Project Manager, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Dana Butler
Exhibit 1 - S.F. Housing Authority Dwelling Lease --------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2 - Fourteen-Day Notice----------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 3 - Proof of Service-------------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:
Restitution and possession of the premises located at 1686 Turk Street, #335, San Francisco.
Rental Agreement declared forfeited.
Back Rent and Damages $3,263.40
Holdover damages $1,927.39
Costs $210.00, for a Total of $5,400.79
Judgment signed in open court.
Counsel stipulated for the return of Exhibits in open court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-02-2007 Off Calendar

HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES
Off Calendar Apr-25-2007 Denied

HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES
Off Calendar Apr-25-2007 Denied
